case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC VS. PABLO R. GUERRERO MENDEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,048.57 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, PABLO R. GUERRERO AKAK PABLO GUERRERO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, PABLO R. GUERRERO AKAK PABLO GUERRERO
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-25-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 25, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED JAN-24-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, PABLO R. GUERRERO AKAK PABLO GUERRERO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, PABLO R. GUERRERO AKAK PABLO GUERRERO $2,048.57 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,158.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
